response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist software engineer with 15+ years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans well under a year. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on major cloud platforms, which are core requirements for this staff-level GenAI position.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server and agentic-workflow tooling experience, directly relevant to the key technologies listed
Deep full-stack engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK) with production systems at scale
Strong customer-facing and mentoring track record via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI exposure is roughly six months
No evidence of RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience
Currently in a career gap and no demonstrated enterprise AI delivery or forward-deployed consulting experience
